summary: AI Chatbot feature fully tested and working. Backend API tests (10/10 passed) and frontend UI tests completed successfully. Chatbot opens from floating button, creates sessions, sends/receives messages, and displays property recommendations with images.
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Chatbot feature is fully functional. Uses Emergent LLM Key (OpenAI gpt-4o-mini) for conversational AI. Chatbot searches properties in MongoDB based on user preferences (budget, BHK type, location, amenities). Property cards display with images loading correctly via getMediaUrl() helper.

chatbot_floating_button.details: Floating button visible at bottom-24 right-6, opens/closes chatbot window

chatbot_new_session.details: Creates new session with welcome message, new chat button works

chatbot_message_send.details: User can type and send messages, input field and send button work

chatbot_ai_response.details: AI responds with property recommendations when user mentions preferences

chatbot_property_cards.details: Property cards display with title, location, rent, and image

chatbot_media_images.details: Images load correctly using getMediaUrl() helper

chatbot_quick_prompts.details: Quick start prompts (2BHK under ₹15,000, etc.) work correctly

mocked_apis.note: Real AI integration with Emergent LLM Key (OpenAI gpt-4o-mini)
